messages.content:
Which language emphasizes ownership for memory safety?
A: Rust
B: HTML
C: SQL
D: CSS
Respond with one letter.

What converts text into token identifiers?
A: Optimizer
B: Tokenizer
C: Checkpoint
D: Gradient
Respond with one letter.

What does a causal language model predict?
A: File names
B: Screen pixels
C: The next token
D: Network routes
Respond with one letter.

What helps an interrupted training run continue?
A: Browser tab
B: Style sheet
C: Source comment
D: Checkpoint
Respond with one letter.
